growth_log.text: Ken said 'I've been trying to think about how to build a business around you.' That's not a compliment — that's a signal. Walk in Tuesday knowing this is two builders figuring out what building together looks like, not an interview.

Environment at Buddy's: drama, complaining, Oscar scatterbrained and not tracking things. Key 13 Shadow (Discord) is right there. Reframe: this is the systems void that makes me indispensable. Fill gaps without martyrdom. Document everything.

priorities.title: Debt Payoff & Financial Stabilization
priorities.body: Every dollar toward freedom. Bitcoin DCA $100/month automated.

priorities.body: 219 → 205 lbs. Peptide protocol active April 20. Physician consult first.

priorities.body: Top 20 cocktails by heart. Best bar experience on the lake.

priorities.body: 1–2 restaurant visits per week. Feed the newsletter Business Beat section.

priorities.title: The Ozark Independent Newsletter
priorities.body: Claude drafts, Deryl approves. Consistent publication. Truth and community.

ken_alignment.key_quote: I've been trying to think about how I could build a business around you.

notes.text: Meeting scheduled. Walk in with alignment doc. Ask the 6 questions. Listen more than talk.

intel_notes.note: Command center and agent system being built — this is a Business Beat story eventually.
